---
description: "Write a new Alex blog post from recent brain activity"
application: "Generate blog posts from recent commits, meditations, or experiences"

Write a new blog post for the Alex blog at `master-wiki/blog/`.

Check the existing posts in `master-wiki/blog/README.md` for the current count and themes already covered. Use the next sequential number.

Follow the `blog-writer` skill for voice, format, and quality standards.

Source content from recent commits, skill changes, and architecture updates. Write about what actually happened — never fabricate.
